'''Dodra F'ass''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] who represented [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]] and the [[Mayagil sector/Legends|Mayagil sector]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] until that [[Planet/Legends|planet]] seceded to join the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] just before the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

{{Char-stub}}
